ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the team (e.g., U19) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to store the team's logo image */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object to store the team's social media links */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_image_url" TEXT /* URL to store the coach's image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief bio of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coach record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coach record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "previously_played_for" TEXT /* Information about teams the player has previously played for */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to store the player's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, friendly, cup) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the match record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  "goals_scored" TEXT /* JSON object to store information about each goal scored during the match */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Outcome of any penalties taken during the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the match result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the match result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* Team's performance trend over time */,
  "average_goals_scored" REAL /* Average goals scored per match */,
  "average_goals_conceded" REAL /* Average goals conceded per match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the season record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the season record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to store the user's image */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* JSON object to store information about the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
